name: Ebrains,Inc.
summary: Ebrains, Inc. designs, develops, and produces industrial electronics and industrial computers designed for information, communications, control, video, and measurement. It offers CompactPCI products; advancedTCA backplane products; backplanes, DIN racks, universal boards, card extenders, unit power supplies, cabinets, and related devices; industrial system chassis with CPU boards and various I/O boards; custom backplanes/custom racks and chassis designed on commission; and custom backplanes/custom racks/custom chassis on commission. The company was founded in 1973 and is headquartered in Hachioji, Japan.
